summary: Work Orders Tab Testing - Backend 100% PASS (14/14 tests), Frontend BLOCKED by pre-existing bug in ProjectDetail.jsx causing crash

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Component crashes with 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading map)' when opening any project detail page
Missing state variable 'showWOForm' - ReferenceError: showWOForm is not defined (FIXED by testing agent)

integration_issues.issue: Component crashes when API returns error or undefined data - null safety missing for scope_items, payment_stages, additional_costs, deductions arrays

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix null safety in ProjectDetail.jsx - the component crashes when projectData arrays are undefined
The destructuring at line 1670 needs full null safety: const { project, scope_items = [], payment_stages = [], additional_costs = [], deductions = [], summary } = projectData || {};
All .map() calls on these arrays need (array || []).map() pattern
The showWOForm state variable was missing - testing agent added it at line 487
critical_code_review_comments: ProjectDetail.jsx line 1670: Destructuring projectData without null safety causes crash when API fails
Lines 1673-1682: .filter() calls on potentially undefined arrays
Lines 1257, 1268, 1279: .find() calls on potentially undefined arrays in reorder handlers
Lines 1338, 1344: .map() calls in toggle functions without null safety
Missing state declaration: showWOForm was used but never declared (fixed by testing agent)
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/ProjectDetail.jsx - Added showWOForm state, added null safety to destructuring and array operations
/app/backend/tests/test_work_orders_crud.py - Created new test file for Work Orders CRUD

success_rate.frontend: 0% - Component crashes before Work Orders tab can be tested

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create and cleanup TEST_ prefixed work orders
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Work Orders CRUD is fully functional. Frontend ProjectDetail.jsx has a critical bug causing crash on page load. The bug is in the render section where arrays from projectData are used without null safety. Testing agent made partial fixes but the component still crashes. Main agent needs to add comprehensive null safety to all array operations in ProjectDetail.jsx.

backend_tests_verified.GET /api/projects/{project_id}/work-orde: PASS - Returns list of work orders
backend_tests_verified.POST /api/projects/{project_id}/work-ord: PASS - Creates work order with scope, stages, additional work
backend_tests_verified.Stage calculations: PASS - Percentage and fixed amount stages calculate correctly
backend_tests_verified.Permission checks: PASS - Accountant cannot create work orders (403)

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: ProjectDetail.jsx component lacks null safety for arrays destructured from projectData. When API calls fail (e.g., 429 rate limit), projectData is set but arrays are undefined, causing .map()/.filter() to crash.
reproduction_steps: 4. Component crashes with 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading map)'
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Add null safety to all array operations: (array || []).map(), (array || []).filter(), etc. Ensure destructuring provides default empty arrays.
